data.name: Commands.Version.Description
data.value: Prints the version of WCount CLI to the console.

data.name: App.Description
data.value: A cross-platform word counting program and wc alternative.

data.name: Arguments.WordCount.Description
data.value: Count the number of words in a file or string.

data.name: Arguments.CharacterCount.Description
data.value: Count the number of characters in a file or string.

data.name: Arguments.LineCount.Description
data.value: Count the number of lines in a file or string.

data.name: Arguments.ByteCount.Description
data.value: Count the number of bytes in a file or string.

data.name: Arguments.FilePaths.Description
data.value: The file path(s) of the file to be read.
